// HGR Sokoban for Apple 1 + GEN2 Color Graphics Card - v4
// 6197 bytes (uses apple1_sok_hgr.cfg, 7296 B budget)
// Targets Apple 1 + 8K DRAM + GEN2 card (16K framebuffer $2000-$3FFF).
// 72 levels: 3 teaching + Microban I #1..#65, #67..#70 by D.W. Skinner (2000)
// Port by VERHILLE Arnaud, 2026
// Keyboard: W/A/S/D (QWERTY) or Z/Q/S/D (AZERTY)
// U=undo last move  R=reset level  N=next level
// Layout: LEVEL_BUF $0020 (ZP) / STATE_GRID $1F00 / Code $0280-$1AB4
// Requires the GEN2 Color Graphics Card (Hardware menu).
// Type 280R in Woz Monitor to run
